info.viSezaH: asya DAtoH vizaye sidDAntakOmudyAm ucyate - SrE iti kfta-Atvasya SrA ityetasya ca sAmAnyena anukaraRam  asya ASayaH ayam - DAtupAWe BvAdigaRe 1.1067 ityatra pAWitaH SrE-DAtuH taTA ca adAdigaRe 2.0048 ityatra pAWitaH SrA-DAtuH - uBayoH 'pAke' asmin arTe yadA prayogaH kriyate tadA tezAm GawAditvajYApanArTam anayoH dvayoH api DAtvoH atra GawAdigaRe punaH nirdeSaH kftaH asti - iti  ataSca atra nirdizwaH SrA-DAtuH pfTak-DAturUpeRa nEva svIkaraRIyaH apitu anyatra pAWitayoH SrADAtvoH pAkArTe GawAdigaRaviDAnArTam anukaraRarUpeREva svIkartavyaH  ata: asya DAtoH pfTak rUpARi atra na dIyante  This dhatu is simply a common reference (placeholder) to the already-existing two dhatus 1.1067 and 2.0048 purely for the purpose of showing that those two dhatus are to be considered a part of GawAdigaRa when used with the specified meanings. Therefore no separate forms have been given for this dhatu.
